# PostOpp

> Privacy-first post-operative symptom tracking for veterans

PostOpp is a free, open-source Progressive Web App (PWA) that helps veterans track post-operative symptoms. All data stays on the user's device — no accounts, no servers, no cloud storage.

## Key Features

- One-tap symptom logging with customizable pain scale (1-10)
- 16 built-in symptom types plus custom symptom creation
- Follow-up reminders to track how symptoms change over time
- Trend visualization with weekly, monthly, and quarterly views
- PDF and JSON export for sharing with healthcare providers
- Optional GPS tagging to identify environmental triggers
- PIN lock and AES-256-GCM encryption for data security
- Works offline as a PWA — no internet required after install

## Privacy

PostOpp collects zero analytics. All symptom data is stored locally in the browser's IndexedDB with AES-256-GCM encryption. No data ever leaves the device unless the user explicitly exports it. There are no user accounts, no tracking, and no third-party services.

## Who It's For

US veterans tracking post-operative symptoms for personal records or to share with their VA medical team. PostOpp is not a medical device and does not provide diagnoses or medical advice.

## Links

- Website: https://postopp.vercel.app
- Privacy Policy: https://postopp.vercel.app/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://postopp.vercel.app/terms
- Full documentation: https://postopp.vercel.app/llms-full.txt
